{
  GroupARowSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class GroupARowSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> NameColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::GroupA.Row, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::GroupA.Row, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Func<global::GroupA.Row, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> AgeColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::GroupA.Row, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Age, configuration);

    public static void AgeHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::GroupA.Row, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, Func<global::GroupA.Row, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupA.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Age);
}
,
  GroupBRowSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class GroupBRowSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> EmailColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::GroupB.Row, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::GroupB.Row, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Func<global::GroupB.Row, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> SalaryColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::GroupB.Row, decimal>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Salary, configuration);

    public static void SalaryHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::GroupB.Row, decimal> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Salary);

    public static void SalaryRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, Func<global::GroupB.Row, decimal, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Salary);

    public static void SalaryInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Salary, value);

    public static void SalaryExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::GroupB.Row, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Salary);
}

}
